case_title: BALWANT D THAKOR VS. RICHARD BABA HOLMES

docket_entries.description: MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR MAR-29-2010 CONTINUED TO MASTER CALENDAR JURY (CONTINUED) ON MAR-30-2010 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206 FOR DEFENDANT TO REVIEW THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. BALWANT THAKOR, PLAINTIFF APPEARING IN PROPRIA PERSONA. RICHARD BABA HOLMES, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PROPRIA PERSONA. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

MASTER JURY CALENDAR OF MAR-30-2010 ASSIGNED TO SHORT CAUSE TRIAL CALENDAR ON MAR-30-2010 AT 10:45 AM IN DEPT. 218, WILLIAM R. GARGANO FOR DEFAULT PROVE-UP HEARING. MR. THAKOR, PLAINTIFF APPEARING IN PROPRIA PERSONA. NO APPEARANCE FOR DEFENDANT RICHARD HOLMES. MR. HOLMES HAD A COPY OF THE SETTLEMENT AGREEEMENT FOR REVIEW AND WAS ORDERED BY THE COURT TO APPEAR ON 3/30/10 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT.206. AT 10:21 A.M., THE COURT ORDERED THIS MATTER FOR A DEFAULT PROVE-UP IN DEPT. 218 FOR NO APPEARANCE BY MR. HOLMES. (206)
